pkgmetadata.longdescription: LiteLLM provides a unified API interface for 100+ LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, vLLM, and more. Acts as an API gateway/proxy that translates calls between different LLM APIs. Features include load balancing, rate limiting, cost tracking, caching, and a management dashboard. Ideal for routing requests across multiple local and cloud models.
